Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add clickable agent filtering, ideas generation, and unit test infrastructure

- Make agent pills clickable to filter tasks by selected agent
- Add filter indicator with clear button in task filters area
- Generate 10 improvement ideas for the project
- Add vitest for unit testing with validator tests \(34 tests\)
- Add fallback activity tracking for background tasks
- Update CLAUDE.md with enhanced session workflow
- Add build:all and test scripts to root package.json

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
